summary: Batch 5 E2E testing: Vacancy bug fix (bounded gap when future tenant outside 90-day window) + Marlins Decal redesign (decal number dropdown instead of checkbox). All 17 backend tests passed and all frontend feature flows verified.

issues: HTML hydration warnings in console: '<span> cannot be child of <tr/thead/tbody/table>'. These appear to come from the development visual editor overlay (x-file-name, x-ve-dynamic attributes on map-rendered table elements). Non-blocking and not production code errors.

critical_code_review_comments: core_logic.py find_upcoming_vacancies: fix is correctly implemented - for the 'after last tenant' case, `future_tenants_all = [t for t in tenants if t['move_in'] > last_out]` checks ALL tenants (not just window-relevant ones), so a future tenant beyond 90 days is found and the gap becomes bounded.
marlins_decals.py: Clean implementation. DELETE correctly un-assigns tenants via update_many before deleting the decal.

TenantFormDialog.js: isAssignedToOther check correctly compares d.assigned_tenant.id !== editing?.id (using optional chaining). This handles both create (editing=null) and edit (editing=tenant) cases.
Test Marlins Prop (69b99d5c2dc4f925a4cffb39) had no units in DB - backend tests created their own units dynamically. Unit 101 created for UI testing and cleaned up after.
seed_data_creation: Created unit 101 for Test Marlins Prop (69b99d5c2dc4f925a4cffb39) for UI testing. Cleaned up after tests. TEST_UI_Marlins_Tenant created and cleaned up. Test decals (TEST-DEL-D etc.) created and cleaned up.
passed_tests: Backend: Vacancy endpoint GET /api/vacancy returns 200
Backend: upcoming_vacancies key present and is a list
Backend: Vacancy bounded gap - tenant A leaves within 90d, tenant B starts after 90d shows 'Vacant X to Y' NOT 'Vacant from X forward'
Backend: Vacancy 'forward' message for unit with no future tenant
Backend: GET /api/marlins-decals returns 200 and list
Backend: GET /api/marlins-decals?property_id filters correctly
Backend: D-001 pre-seeded for property 69b99d5c2dc4f925a4cffb39
Backend: All decals have assigned_tenant field (possibly null)
Backend: POST /api/marlins-decals creates decal and returns with assigned_tenant=null
Backend: Created decal appears in subsequent GET
Backend: DELETE /api/marlins-decals/{id} returns {message: 'Decal deleted'}
Backend: DELETE nonexistent decal returns 404
Backend: DELETE decal clears marlins_decal_id on assigned tenant
Backend: Tenant created with marlins_decal_id saves and persists
Backend: PUT tenant can update marlins_decal_id to value and to null
Backend: GET /api/marlins-decals assigned_tenant enrichment shows tenant name and unit_id
Frontend: Properties page loads with Decal Assignments section (blue shield icon) for Marlins properties
Frontend: Clicking Decal Assignments expands and shows input + Add button
Frontend: D-001 shows as 'Available' in decals list
Frontend: Tenant create dialog - no decal dropdown before property selection
Frontend: Tenant create dialog - Marlins Decal Assignment dropdown appears after selecting Test Marlins Prop
Frontend: D-001 shows as '— Available' in decal dropdown
Frontend: Selecting D-001 and saving tenant works
Frontend: D-001 shows tenant name + Unit 101 in Properties Decal Assignments section
Frontend: TenantDetailDialog shows 'Marlins Decal: D-001' badge
Frontend: Edit tenant dialog shows D-001 pre-selected as '— Currently yours'
Frontend: Selecting 'No decal assigned' and saving clears decal
Frontend: D-001 returns to 'Available' after clearing tenant assignment
Frontend: Delete decal from Properties page removes it + shows 'Decal deleted' toast
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 5 fully tested. (1) Vacancy bug fix: find_upcoming_vacancies correctly shows bounded gap 'Vacant X to Y' when future tenant is outside 90-day window. (2) Marlins Decals: full CRUD + tenant assignment lifecycle tested and working. Test Marlins Prop (69b99d5c2dc4f925a4cffb39) has D-001 available. No units remain on this property (unit 101 was cleaned up). Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_batch5_decals_vacancy.py (17 tests, all pass).
